root_cause: StatefulSet ordered rollout is blocked because ordinal 2 cannot finish startup
evidence: StatefulSet 'ledger-db' is split between revisions 'ledger-db-6b6b6d4c9f' and 'ledger-db-7d889b5d7c' with 1/3 replicas updated
Pod 'ledger-db-2' is ordinal 2 and is the current ordered rollout gate for revision 'ledger-db-7d889b5d7c'
Recent rollout and startup signals for ordinal 2 persisted for 8.0 minutes
Startup probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 500

causes.message: StatefulSet 'ledger-db' is rolling from revision 'ledger-db-6b6b6d4c9f' to 'ledger-db-7d889b5d7c'
Container 'db' on ordinal 2 is still failing startupProbe checks
Lower ordinals 0, 1 cannot advance to revision 'ledger-db-7d889b5d7c' until ordinal 2 becomes Ready
StatefulSet rollout remains split at 1/3 updated replicas

pod:ledger-db-2: Lower ordinals 0, 1 cannot advance to revision 'ledger-db-7d889b5d7c' until ordinal 2 becomes Ready
container:db: Startup probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 500

likely_causes: The new StatefulSet revision introduced an application or configuration regression that prevents the updated ordinal from completing startup
The startupProbe budget is too short for the workload's real initialization or recovery time on the updated revision
The ordinal-specific data set or migration path for this replica makes startup slower or more failure-prone than other replicas
A dependency, secret, or local volume assumption changed in the new revision and only surfaces once the updated ordinal starts
suggested_checks: Compare currentRevision and updateRevision and inspect the highest updated ordinal before proceeding with lower ordinals
